title: Allocation execution window is more restrictive than the settlement model
description: The allocation execution window is more restrictive than what the settlement model allows. Legitimate settlement operations may fail because the allocation's time constraints are tighter than the settlement's overall timeline, creating unnecessary execution failures.
recommendation: Align the allocation execution window with the settlement model's timing constraints to avoid rejecting valid operations.

oracle.description: Allocation time window is stricter than the settlement model's window, causing valid operations to be rejected.
oracle.static_signal: Time window validation in allocation that uses stricter bounds than the parent settlement's time window

notes: Temporal window misalignment is a recurring DAML audit finding.
